description: The Set Local Position node sets the input slot's position to the provided position vector in local coordinate space.

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Sets the Instance slot's local position when an impulse is received.
fields.Instance: The slot whose local position is set. Default is null, the node does not function without this input.
fields.Position: The local position the input Instance slot is set to. Default is [0;0;0].
fields.Next: An impulse is fired whenever the Instance slot's position is set after the node receives an impulse. No impulse is fired from this output if the Instance input is null.
